populate.description: Features to generate in the world.

dependencies.description: Mod dependencies required for this configuration to load.

enabled.description: Whether the file should be read at all.

priority.description: The loading priority of the file. Files with a higher priority are read first.

namespace.description: When specified, this string is prepended to the names of the features described in populate.

forge_mod_entry.description: A Forge mod entry describes a mod, optionally with a specific version or range of versions.

id.description: The internal mod ID that the mod registers itself with.

version.description: The version of the mod. May be a specific version, or a Maven-compatible version range.

exclude.description: If true, the file will only be read if the specified mod is NOT installed.

feature.description: Describes a feature to generate in the world.

generator.description: The type of feature to generate. When specified as an array, a feature type configuration is chosen randomly.

distribution.description: The distribution type used to distribute the feature in the world.

cluster-count.description: How many attempts to generate the feature are done in a chunk.

chunk-chance.description: The chance of a chunk containing the feature at all. One in [chance] chunks.

in-village.description: Whether the feature may be generated in the same area as a village.

biome.description: The biomes in which the feature may be generated.

dimension.description: The dimensions in which the feature may be generated.

retrogen.description: Whether to generate the feature in previously generated chunks.

enabled.description: Whether to generate the feature at all.

ground-level.description: (cave) The altitude below which to look for caves.

x-offset.description: (custom) The X coordinate at which to place features, relative to the center of each chunk.

y-offset.description: (custom) The Y coordinate at which to place features.

z-offset.description: (custom) The Z coordinate at which to place features, relative to the center of each chunk.

min-height.description: (fractal, uniform) The minimum altitude to place features at.

max-height.description: (uniform) The maximum altitude to place features at.

vein-height.description: (fractal) The height of the area to distribute a chunk's features in.

vein-diameter.description: (fractal) The width of the area to distribute a chunk's features in.

vertical-density.description: (fractal) Determines how close together features should be vertically. (0-100)

horizontal-density.description: (fractal) Determines how close together features should be horizontally. (0-100)

center-height.description: (gaussian) The altitude to place features around.

spread.description: (gaussian) The maximum distance from the center altitude at which features may be placed.

smoothness.description: (gaussian) Determines how smoothly the amount of features declines when further from the center altitude.

features.description: (sequential) The distributions to distribute features with in sequence.

material.description: (surface, underfluid, underwater) The type(s) of block that features may be placed on top of or replaced.

follow-terrain.description: (surface) Whether to consider any block as the highest block.

fluid.description: (underfluid) The type(s) of fluid below which features may be placed.

feature_type_configuration.description: Specifies and configures the type of feature to generate.

material.description: The type(s) of block that may be replaced to generate the feature.

weight.description: How likely the feature type configuration is to be selected.

block.description: The type(s) of block that the feature consists of.

diameter.description: (boulder) The minimum radius of a boulder, in blocks.

size-variance.description: (boulder, spike, stalagmite, stalactite) The maximum amount of blocks randomly added to the size/radius.

count.description: (boulder) The amount of boulders that a group of boulders may consist of.

count-variance.description: (boulder) The maximum amount randomly added to the number of boulders.

hollow.description: (boulder, geode) If true, boulders are hollowed out / geodes can have filler.

hollow-size.description: (boulder) The size of the hollow part of a hollow boulder.

hollow-variance.description: (boulder) How much the size of the hollow part may differ per boulder.

cluster-size.description: (cluster, decoration, sparse-cluster, large-vein) How large the deposits are or max branches.

sparse.description: (large-vein) If true, the total amount of main branches in deposits is reduced.

spindly.description: (large-vein) If true, the amount of main branches in deposits is reduced by 1 for each block generated.

use-material.description: (lake) When false, any block may be replaced to generate lakes.

outline-block.description: (lake) The block(s) to surround lakes with.

solid-outline.description: (lake) If true, every block in the outline of a lake is generated.

total-outline.description: (lake) If true, the outline of a lake completely surrounds it.

gap-block.description: (lake) The block(s) to place above lakes to carve out space.

radius.description: (plate, spout) The radius of a plate or spout, in blocks.

height.description: (plate, spout) The amount of vertical layers / height in blocks.

slim.description: (plate) If true, the top layer of plates is not generated.

shape.description: (plate, spout) The shape as seen from above.

crust.description: (geode) The block(s) used to generate the outermost layer of geodes.

filler.description: (geode) The blocks(s) used to generate a core.

min-height.description: (spike, stalagmite, stalactite, small-tree) The minimum height.

height-variance.description: (spike, stalagmite, stalactite, small-tree) Max blocks added to min-height.

large-spikes.description: (spike) Whether some spikes may be generated as 'large' spikes.

large-spike-height-variance.description: (spike) Max blocks added to min height gain of a large spike.

large-spike-filler-size.description: (spike) Radius of additional layers of a large spike.

gen-body.description: (stalagmite, stalactite) Block(s) that may be replaced.

gen-size.description: (stalagmite, stalactite) Minimum radius of the base.

leaves.description: (small-tree) The block(s) used to generate leaves.

leaf-variance.description: (small-tree) Blocks randomly removed from corners of leaves.

tree-checks.description: (small-tree) Verify trees can properly grow before generation.

relaxed-growth.description: (small-tree) Generated with blocks adjacent to bottom.

water-loving.description: (small-tree) Generated in water up to leaves.

structure.description: (structure) The path to the NBT file of the structure.

ignored-block.description: (structure) A type of block in the structure that should not be generated.

ignore-entities.description: (structure) If true, entities included in the structure file are not generated.

rotation.description: (structure) The possible rotations of the generated structure.

mirror.description: (structure) The possible ways in which the generated structure may be mirrored.

generators.description: (consecutive, sequential) The features to generate consecutively/in sequence.

surface.description: (decoration, small-tree) The type(s) of block that it may generate on top of.

see-sky.description: (decoration) Whether to only generate blocks in places with a direct line of sight to the sky.

check-stay.description: (decoration) Whether to only generate blocks when they can be sustained.

stack-height.description: (decoration) How many times to vertically stack each block in a group.

x-variance.description: (decoration) The max amount of blocks added to the X coordinate.

y-variance.description: (decoration) The max amount of blocks added to the Y coordinate.

z-variance.description: (decoration) The max amount of blocks added to the Z coordinate.

block_id.description: Specifies a type of block in the world.

number_provider.description: A source of numbers. Can be a constant, random, world value, operation, or bounded.

weighted_string.description: A string along with its chance of being randomly selected.

biome_restriction.description: Specifies the biomes in which a feature may or may not be generated.

biome_entry.description: A method to match one or more biomes.

dimension_restriction.description: Specifies the dimensions in which a feature may or may not be generated.
